header: In Brooklyn and Lower Manhattan, no Inwood-bound [A] at High St, Fulton St, Chambers St, Canal St and Spring St
description:
Inwood-bound [A] runs via the [F] from Jay St-MetroTech to W 4 St-Wash Sq.

Travel Alternatives:
For High St, use the nearby York St [F] station instead.

For Fulton St, take the [J] via transfer at the Delancey St-Essex St [F] station. Or, use the nearby World Trade Center [accessibility icon] | [E] station via transfer at W 4 St-Wash Sq.

For Chambers St/World Trade Center, Canal St and Spring St, take the [E] or downtown [A][C] via transfer at W 4 St-Wash Sq.

What's happening?
Track maintenance 

[accessibility icon] This service change affects one or more ADA accessible stations and these travel alternatives may not be fully accessible. Please contact 511 to plan your trip.
